common.tagline: How can I help you today?
common.search_placeholder: Ask a technical question or type / for tools...

welcome.title: Welcome to Vibrisse Agent
welcome.subtitle: Your code expert agent is ready. What would you like to accomplish today?
welcome.suggestion_code_text: Analyze the architecture of this project and explain the technical choices.
welcome.suggestion_bug_text: Find potential bugs or security flaws in the src folder.
welcome.suggestion_opt_text: How could I optimize the performance of this frontend?

sidebar.wipe_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the indexing (RAG) and all history? This action is irreversible.

chat.working: Vibrisse is working on the response...
chat.new_session_msg: New session started. How can I help you today?

input.placeholder: Ask a question or type @ to cite a file...
input.mic_not_supported: Voice recognition is not supported on this browser.

system.context_tooltip: The fuller the memory, the more likely the agent is to forget the first details of the conversation.
system.ram_tooltip: Detail: {{used}} GB used out of {{total}} GB total.
system.swap_tooltip: Warning: Your Mac is using the disk (Swap) because the RAM is saturated. Reduced performance.

ragas.info_tip: Analysis requires a powerful local model (e.g. Llama3 8B) to be reliable.

security.request_msg: The agent wants to execute the following command on your system:
security.warning_text: ⚠️ Warning: Executing terminal commands can be dangerous. Always verify the command before authorizing it.

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Small models, Great tools. Let's configure your surgical engineering studio.
onboarding.hw_subtitle: Analyzing your machine to optimize performance...

onboarding.workspace_subtitle: Where is your project located? We'll start indexing it immediately.
onboarding.final_notice: Note: Large projects might take a few minutes to index. You can track progress in the sidebar.
